summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Super Like (3/day limit), In-App Notifications, and Change Password. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI components are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/auth/change-password - successfully changes password
Backend: /api/auth/change-password - rejects incorrect current password (400)
Backend: /api/auth/change-password - rejects short new password (<6 chars)
Backend: /api/auth/change-password - requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/notifications - returns notification list for user
Backend: /api/notifications/unread/count - returns unread count
Backend: /api/notifications/{id}/read - returns 404 for non-existent notification
Backend: /api/notifications/read-all - marks all as read
Backend: /api/notifications endpoints require authentication
Backend: /api/superlikes/remaining - returns 3 for new user
Backend: /api/superlikes/remaining - decrements after superlike
Backend: /api/swipe superlike - blocks 4th superlike (400 with limit message)
Backend: Regular likes work after superlike limit reached
Backend: /api/superlikes/remaining - restricted to seekers only (403 for recruiter)
Frontend: NotificationBell visible on SeekerDashboard
Frontend: NotificationBell visible on RecruiterDashboard
Frontend: Notification dropdown opens with 'No notifications yet' message
Frontend: Super Like button has badge showing remaining count (3)
Frontend: Super Like badge decrements after use (3 -> 2)
Frontend: Toast shows 'Super Like sent! (2 remaining today)'
Frontend: Stats bar updates (Applied, Super Likes counters)
Frontend: Change Password toggle expands/collapses in Profile
Frontend: Current Password input present with data-testid
Frontend: New Password input present with data-testid
Frontend: Confirm Password input present with data-testid
Frontend: Change Password submit button present with data-testid
critical_code_review_comments: Super Like daily limit (3) correctly enforced with date-based counting
Notifications properly integrated via WebSocket for real-time updates
Change Password validates current password before allowing update
All new endpoints have proper authentication checks
Frontend data-testid attributes present for all new interactive elements

test_credentials.note: Test users created during testing with TEST_ prefix

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users (TEST_changepw_*, TEST_notif_*, TEST_seeker_*, TEST_recruiter_*) and test jobs for superlike testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features fully implemented and tested: 1) Super Like with 3/day limit - badge shows remaining, swipe response returns remaining_superlikes, 2) NotificationBell component on both dashboards with dropdown, 3) Change Password collapsible section in Profile. All backend APIs working, all frontend components functional.

super_like_feature.frontend: Badge on superlike button shows remaining count, updates after use

notifications.frontend: NotificationBell component with dropdown on SeekerDashboard and RecruiterDashboard

change_password.frontend: Collapsible form in Profile page with password visibility toggles
